## Description

<!-- What changed? Keep this focused on the user-visible behavior or developer workflow. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR closes or references. Example: Closes #123 -->

## Motivation and Context

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve for GPT-Voice users or maintainers? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, release, or CI
- [ ] Security fix

## Desktop Impact

<!-- Mark the areas affected by this change. -->

- [ ] Main process / Electron lifecycle
- [ ] Renderer UI
- [ ] Preload / IPC contract
- [ ] Browser automation / CloakBrowser
- [ ] ChatGPT provider flow
- [ ] Audio recording or clipboard behavior
- [ ] Packaging / release artifacts
- [ ] No desktop runtime impact

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Include commands, OS, install method, and any manual checks. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run validate:dependabot`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:cloakbrowser`
- [ ] Packaged app smoke test
- [ ] Manual ChatGPT login and transcription test

## Screenshots or Recordings

<!-- Add screenshots for UI changes and short recordings for workflow changes when helpful. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] This branch was created from `main`.
- [ ] The PR targets `main`.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, setup, or release flow changed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, session data, browser cache, audio samples, or local build artifacts.
- [ ] I considered Linux and Windows impact where relevant.
- [ ] My contribution follows the project license and contribution guidelines.
